---
title: ""
---

::: {.hero-tagline}

Computational Methods · Research Software · Quantitative Finance

:::

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="60%"}

## About the Lab

We love rapid calculations using novel computational methods. We enjoy advancing machine learning and artificial intelligence, and understanding how these tools can be used to solve scientific and engineering problems. Quantitative finance is a natural application area because of the richness of the available data. The fact that real capital is involved raises the bar even higher—it is no longer just about numerical stability, accuracy, and computational speed. Real money is made or lost depending on the efficacy of our systems. That provides the ultimate validation of whether what we build actually works.

<br>

[Learn more about the lab →](about.qmd)

::::

:::: {.column width="40%"}

## Current Research

- Quantitative Research Platform
- Research Visualization
- Cash Flow Analysis
- Feature Engineering
- What is Moving the Market?
- Interconnected Markets
- Statistical Arbitrage
- Machine Learning for Market Analysis
- Neural Networks for Market Problems

<br>

[Explore all research →](research.qmd)

::::

:::

---

```{=html}
<section class="founder-section">

<h2>Karthik Palaniappan</h2>

<div class="founder-title">
Founder<br>
Scientific Computing Lab, August Academy
</div>

<div class="founder">

  <div class="founder-photo-column">
    <img
      src="assets/images/founder/kp1.jpeg"
      alt="Karthik Palaniappan"
      class="founder-photo">
  </div>

  <div class="founder-text">

    <p>
      I began my research career at Stanford University developing numerical
      algorithms for computational fluid dynamics, optimization,
      high-performance scientific computing, and optimization. Since then,
      my work has spanned industrial research and development, software
      engineering, entrepreneurship, and quantitative finance.
    </p>

    <p>
      Today, my interests lie in building computational tools that enable
      rigorous, reproducible quantitative research and making advanced
      computational methods more accessible to researchers and practitioners.
    </p>

    <p>
      <a href="about.html">Read more →</a>
    </p>

  </div>

</div>

</section>
```

---

## Connect

```{=html}
<div class="connect">

<a href="https://github.com/karthik-palaniappan"
   title="GitHub"
   target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/karthikpalaniappan/"
   title="LinkedIn"
   target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>

<a href="http://aero-comlab.stanford.edu/karthik/index.html"
   title="Stanford Research"
   target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i></a>

<a href="https://mbaadmissions.augustacademy.in"
   title="August Academy"
   target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-globe"></i></a>

</div>
